Class JavaSubtypeSearch

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.JavaSubtypeSearch
public class JavaSubtypeSearch extends Object
A "Finder" command object that recursively searches for all subtypes (implementations and subclasses) of a given JavaType.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final JavaHierarchyNode
    rootNode
    The root node of the subtype hierarchy tree.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    JavaSubtypeSearch(JavaType rootType, int maxDepth)
    Performs a recursive subtype search.

    Method
    Description
    private void
    buildSubtypeTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, TypeElement te, JavaHierarchyNode node, int depth, Set<String> visited)
    Recursively builds the subtype tree using the NetBeans ClassIndex.

  • Field Details

    • rootNode

      private final JavaHierarchyNode rootNode
      The root node of the subtype hierarchy tree.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaSubtypeSearch

      public JavaSubtypeSearch(JavaType rootType, int maxDepth) throws Exception
      Performs a recursive subtype search.
      Parameters:
      rootType - The starting type.
      maxDepth - The maximum depth to recurse.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the search fails.

  • Method Details

    • buildSubtypeTree

      private void buildSubtypeTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, TypeElement te, JavaHierarchyNode node, int depth, Set<String> visited)
      Recursively builds the subtype tree using the NetBeans ClassIndex.
      Parameters:
      info - The current compilation context.
      te - The type element to find implementors for.
      node - The current node in the hierarchy tree.
      depth - The remaining depth to search.
      visited - Set of visited FQNs to prevent cycles in broken classpaths.
